name: Pathmark Local App Windows
label: Focus hierarchy polish
release_notes: Fixes the focus-based project hierarchy so supporting time blocks render directly beneath their parent focus block without raw HTML, and improves printable tasklist indentation.
notes: Corrects focus-based project rendering so supporting time blocks are rendered with Streamlit containers rather than nested raw HTML strings.
Supporting time blocks now sit directly beneath their focus block in the project view with a visible nested rail and card treatment.
Improves printable tasklist hierarchy so supporting time blocks are styled as indented support rows rather than plain offset text.
Keeps the v0.7.5 linked Calendar/Tasks management workflow.
